headline: Pediatric Dermatology in Chennai -- Child-Friendly Skin Care
subheadline: A patient, age-appropriate approach to your child's skin, hair, and nail concerns from a trained paediatric dermatologist.
metaDescription: Pediatric dermatology in KK Nagar, Chennai from an AIIMS-trained paediatric dermatologist. Book a consultation for your child.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Trained Paediatric Dermatologist
whyPatientsChoose.description: Dr. Narayanan A completed a dedicated paediatric dermatology fellowship at JIPMER, Puducherry -- not general dermatology experience alone.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Child-Friendly Approach
whyPatientsChoose.description: We work at your child's pace, explaining things in an age-appropriate way to reduce anxiety around the visit.

symptoms: Persistent rash or dry, itchy patches
Diaper rash not improving with basic care

educationalInsight.title: Common Childhood Skin Concerns
educationalInsight.body: Children's skin presents a distinct set of conditions compared to adults, and treatment always needs to account for age, skin sensitivity, and what's realistic for a parent to maintain at home.

steps: Age-appropriate examination and history from parent/caregiver
Clear explanation to the child where possible

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: My child is scared of doctor visits -- will this be difficult for them?
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: We work specifically to make paediatric visits comfortable -- explaining things at their level, going at their pace, and keeping the environment as unintimidating as a clinical visit can be.

processSteps.title: Evaluation
processSteps.description: Age-appropriate examination and detailed history from you as the parent or caregiver.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.description: A realistic routine you can maintain daily, alongside any needed medical treatment.

processSteps.title: Follow-Up
processSteps.description: Monitoring appropriate to your child's specific condition as they grow.

landingFaqs.question: What age range do you see?
landingFaqs.answer: We see patients from infancy through the teenage years, adapting our approach to each child's age and comfort.

landingFaqs.question: Will the visit be stressful for my child?
landingFaqs.answer: We work to make visits comfortable, using age-appropriate explanations and working at your child's pace.

landingFaqs.question: What if it turns out to be nothing serious?
landingFaqs.answer: Many childhood skin concerns are common and easily managed -- accurate reassurance is itself a valuable outcome of an evaluation.

learnMoreLink.text: Learn more about our pediatric dermatology care
